subcodes.first_line: The heaven is manifest with evident smoke, and the earth speaketh forth its chronicles, whilst the mountains pass like unto clouds that drift in their course [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آسمان بدخان مبین ظاهر و زمین بذکر وقایع ناطق و جبال شبه سحاب در مرور ولکن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital, @predictions and prophecies, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
